evals.prompt: Scan my website for security vulnerabilities: https://example.com
evals.expected_output: OWASP security scan results with identified vulnerabilities and remediation guidance.

evals.prompt: Check if this dApp frontend is secure before we launch: https://mydapp.io
evals.expected_output: Security assessment of the dApp frontend with Web3-specific vulnerability analysis.

evals.prompt: Is this website vulnerable to XSS attacks? https://testsite.com
evals.expected_output: XSS vulnerability analysis with specific findings and mitigation steps.
assertions: Remediation steps are provided if vulnerabilities found
